strategy.current_status: HALTED: Neverendersinc account permanently blocked since 2026-05-19
strategy.path_forward: A human Wikipedia editor with no COI connection to artonly.io or Amos Le Blanc would need to review the clean draft (vossadvisory repo: wikipedia/draft_amos_le_blanc_clean_2026-06-13.txt) and submit it from their own account. Alternatively, the artonly.io team could seek a neutral editor via WP:VOLUN or WP:COIN. Do not create new accounts to evade the block.
strategy.what_reviewers_want: Independent newspaper or magazine coverage about the director as a person, not just mentions in client campaign coverage. LBBOnline, shots.net, SHOOTonline, and Campaign US are acceptable trade publications. The 2016 Sweet Shop signing coverage (5 publications) and the 2019 Young Guns 17 coverage (LBBOnline dedicated article, SHOOTonline) are the strongest GNG evidence.
strategy.source_quality: LBBOnline, shots.net, SHOOTonline, Campaign US, The One Club = strong. VideoStatic, EARMILK, EDM Canada, Ad Age, adobo Magazine = acceptable. YouTube, Vimeo, IMVDb, iSpot, Newswire.ca, self-published = never.
strategy.reviewer_engagement: Always thank reviewers by name, respond on talk page within 24h, be specific about what changed. COI must be disclosed per WP:PAID.

cited_on.note: External links added to Tove Lo, Little Simz, and Tems Wikipedia articles in May 2026 session were removed by other editors by May 25, 2026. No artonly.io links currently appear on Wikipedia.
